# Business Automation Consultant

## What this sleeve does
Business Automation Consultant is a business-domain sleeve focused on discovering automation opportunities, designing OpenClaw-based automation architecture, and implementing practical business workflows.

## NeoStacks in this sleeve
- `S.01` Business Assessment & Discovery Stack
- `S.02` Automation Architecture Design Stack
- `S.03` Social Media Automation Stack
- `S.04` Operations & Process Automation Stack
- `S.05` Scheduling & Calendar Automation Stack
- `S.06` Financial Automation Stack
- `S.07` Implementation & Training Stack
- `S.08` Monitoring & Optimization Stack

## NeoBlocks in this sleeve
The extracted public structure currently carries one explicit NeoBlock example:
- `N.03.01` Content Calendar Management

## MOLT blocks inside the extracted NeoBlock
- `TRG.BIZ.013` Social Media Planning Required
- `DIR.BIZ.013` Establish Sustainable Content Calendar
- `INST.SOCIAL.001` Content Calendar Setup Procedure
- `SUBJ.SOCIAL.001` Social Media Automation Fundamentals
- `PHIL.SOCIAL.001` Social Media Automation Philosophy
- `BP.SOCIAL.001` Content Calendar Template

## Notes
This sleeve is part of the public business category and represents a practical service/business automation advisory posture.
